institution.name: Faith Baptist Bible College and Theological Seminary

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Faith Baptist Bible College and Theological Seminary are 27% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($40.6k vs $55.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Faith Baptist Bible College and Theological Seminary rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.0k → $13.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Faith Baptist Bible College and Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.2k → $20.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Faith Baptist Bible College and Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.2k → $20.3k).
